setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added basic test coverage for UnitTest1 class with two test methods
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more specific test scenarios and business logic tests
fileReports.note: Minimal test coverage due to limited source code complexity

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, null input handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Add logging mechanism to replace Console.WriteLine for better testability
Consider adding more detailed error handling in writeMessage method
Implement dependency injection for ProducerConfig to improve flexibility
fileReports.note: Tests require a local Kafka broker for full integration testing. Mock Kafka producer might be needed for complete isolation.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Startup class covering configuration, service registration, and environment-specific configurations
recommendations: Add more detailed configuration section mocking
Consider adding integration tests with WebApplicationFactory
Implement more granular environment configuration tests
fileReports.note: Ensure mock setup matches actual configuration structure

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, exception handling, and disposal behavior
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging for exception scenarios
Implement more granular error handling in readMessage method
Add cancellation token support for more flexible message consumption
keyImprovements: Null and edge case scenario testing
fileReports.note: Tests rely on Confluent.Kafka configuration and may require additional setup in actual test environment

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model with 100% property coverage and multiple scenario validations
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for stronger model validation
Implement custom validation logic for quantity and product name if needed
keyImprovements: Edge case testing for null and extreme values
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic model behavior without external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController with 6 test cases covering various scenarios including valid/invalid requests, serialization, constructor initialization, and error handling
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in the controller
fileReports.note: Tests assume existence of OrderRequest model and ProducerWrapper class

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProcessOrdersService with 6 test methods covering constructor initialization, order processing scenarios, error handling, and cancellation behavior
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in the service
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more granular exception handling for JSON deserialization
keyImprovements: Covered null and invalid JSON scenarios
Added theory test for multiple product types
fileReports.note: Requires Confluent.Kafka and Newtonsoft.Json dependencies for full test execution
